subcodes.first_line: O min herlige Herre! Hjelp meg til å avstå fra enhver avvikende tilbøyelighet; til å holde enhver opprørsk lidenskap i t
subcodes.notes: Theory: AB patience prayer -- "O my glorious Lord! Help me to abstain from every wayward inclination; hold every rebellious passion in check; make pure the motives of my conduct; humility no challenge can upset, patience no suffering can end, uprightness no selfishness can shake." Not in inventory. X-code candidate (XAB). Challenge: Gemini times out on all 3 strategies.
